summary: Iteration 6 — Static-only verification of 'block Clinic radio on Free-interpretation flow' feature. All 8 required implementation points confirmed. No dotnet SDK in sandbox; no runtime testing performed.

verification_checklist.1_AuthUrlFree_helper_in_Landing: PASS — Landing.cshtml line 20 declares `AuthUrlFree(string tab) => Url.Action("Auth","Home", new{tab, flow="free"})` alongside existing AuthUrl at line 15.
verification_checklist.2_exactly_4_CTAs_use_AuthUrlFree: PASS — 4 occurrences of @AuthUrlFree in Landing.cshtml at lines 131 (hero-cta-primary), 326 (pillar-ind-cta), 463 (compare-cta), 539 (pricing-cta). All 4 required data-testids matched.
verification_checklist.3_unchanged_CTAs_still_use_AuthUrl: PASS — land-signin (L83), land-getstarted (L86), pillar-lab-cta (L350), pillar-cln-cta (L375), b2b-cta (L556) all still use @AuthUrl. Total AuthUrl occurrences match expected 5+helper.
verification_checklist.4_HomeController_Auth_reads_flow: PASS — HomeController.cs line 29: `public IActionResult Auth(string? tab=null, string? flow=null)`. Line 44-45 case-insensitive check sets ViewData["Flow"]="free".
verification_checklist.5_AccountController_Register_coercion_BE: PASS — AccountController.cs lines 87-95 read Request.Form["flow"] and coerce UserType="Individual" + null out ClinicName/ClinicCity/ClinicAddress + set ViewData["Flow"]="free". This block runs BEFORE the Clinic-field validation block at lines 100-108. ViewData["Flow"] survives re-render.
verification_checklist.6a_isFreeFlow_computed: PASS — Index.cshtml line 19: `var isFreeFlow = string.Equals(ViewData["Flow"] as string, "free", OrdinalIgnoreCase);` Line 20 force-sets registerModel.UserType="Individual".
verification_checklist.6b_hidden_flow_input: PASS — Index.cshtml line 127-129: `@if (isFreeFlow) { <input type="hidden" name="flow" value="free" data-testid="register-flow-free" /> }` inside register form.
verification_checklist.6c_conditional_clinic_radio: PASS — Index.cshtml line 148 `@if (!isFreeFlow)` wraps the entire userTypeClinic radio+label (lines 150-154). Not rendered at all in free flow.
verification_checklist.6d_individual_force_checked: PASS — Index.cshtml line 142: `@(isFreeFlow || !string.Equals(registerModel.UserType, "Clinic", ...) ? "checked" : "")` — isFreeFlow short-circuits to checked.
verification_checklist.7_JS_null_guard: PASS — Index.cshtml line 307: `if (!rIndividual || !rClinic || !clinicFields) return;` — when Clinic radio not rendered, rClinic is null and the toggle IIFE bails out safely.
verification_checklist.8_no_side_effects_on_other_flows: PASS — Login flow (AccountController lines 460+), VerifyEmail (line 187+), header nav (Landing L83/86), B2B/PillarLab/PillarCln CTAs remain on plain AuthUrl. No modifications observed.

critical_code_review_comments: Server-side defense-in-depth is correctly ordered: flow coercion at L87-95 executes BEFORE the Clinic-required validation at L100-108, so a hand-crafted POST with UserType=Clinic&flow=free won't trip required-field errors. Good.

ViewData["Flow"]="free" is set both by HomeController.Auth (GET) and by AccountController.Register (POST) — this correctly preserves the free-flow state across a validation-error re-render of Index.cshtml. Good.
The `else` branch at AccountController L109-113 defensively coerces any non-Clinic UserType to 'Individual' — combined with the free-flow coercion this makes the free path bulletproof.

Minor: consider adding a data-testid to the hidden Individual pill container in Index.cshtml to make Playwright verification of the 'clinic radio absent' state easier, but not required for correctness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 was static-only verification (no dotnet SDK in sandbox). The 'Free-interpretation flow blocks Clinic radio' feature is correctly implemented across Landing.cshtml (AuthUrlFree helper + 4 CTA migrations), HomeController.Auth (reads ?flow=free), AccountController.Register (server-side coercion BEFORE Clinic validation), and Index.cshtml (isFreeFlow gate on userTypeClinic radio + hidden flow input + JS null-guard). User will validate runtime on VS2026.
